title: Implement Rust benchmark for single vs recursive discovery
description: Add Rust benchmark that measures time to index issues for single project vs recursive discovery across multiple project folders using the fixtures.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added rust/src/bin/discovery_benchmark.rs to benchmark single vs multi-project discovery/list/ready using deterministic fixture layout. Ran: cargo run --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --bin discovery_benchmark -- --root tools/tmp/benchmark-discovery-fixtures.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Rust benchmark runs locally, prints timings for single-project and recursive modes, and uses the shared fixtures.
